title: Effect Monitor
description: A lightweight client-side mod that notifies you when your potion effects are about to expire.
body:
# 🧪 Effect Monitor

**Never miss a fading potion effect again.**

Effect Monitor is a lightweight client-side mod that gives you customizable alerts when your potion effects are about to expire. Perfect for PvP, PvE, or everyday survival players who rely on buffs and need a heads-up before they run out.

## ✨ Features

- ⏳ Alerts when effects hit custom time thresholds (e.g. `60s`, `30s`, `5s`)
- 🎮 Choose between **Title** or **Actionbar** notifications
- 🔔 Optional sound cue when alerts appear
- 🧠 Filter which effects are tracked:
  - All effects
  - Only positive effects (e.g. Strength, Night Vision)
  - Only negative effects (e.g. Poison, Weakness)
- 🛠 In-game config menu with:
  - Threshold editor (`+/- 5s`, up to `4 minutes`)
  - Enable/disable toggles
  - No config file editing required

## 🧩 Compatibility

- ✅ **Fabric** (client-side only)
- ✅ Client side - so it works on **any server**

## 📥 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use) (or Quilt)
2. Drop this mod in your `/mods` folder
3. Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## 🔗 External Links
